new_files.reason: Public select_top_k() selection logic per LLD topic_selector.py section; new module, no existing file to modify.
Test spec explicitly named in issue #23's 4.4.1 acceptance criteria.

dependents_scanned.finding: No dependency on topic_selector; sibling module in same package, checked only for style/docstring convention precedent.
Empty; no re-exports needed, none added (mirrors existing convention -- ingestion/__init__.py also empty).
No coupling introduced; used only as design precedent (read-only), not imported by topic_selector.py.

cross_module_impacts.note: Already merged (#21/4.2.1); this dispatch does not touch Go engine or proto.
Read-only reference for CandidateTopic/SearchCandidatesResponse field shapes; no proto changes.
Already fully specifies 4.4.1's behavior; no LLD update needed/made.

out_of_scope_confirmed: agents/query gRPC client wiring (SearchCandidates channel/stub) -- deferred, likely issue #25; 4.4.1 takes already-decoded candidates as input, no gRPC import added
risk_notes: Design choice: select_top_k() takes Sequence[TopicCandidate] directly (not a raw SearchCandidatesFn callable), matching the test spec's 'fixture candidate list' wording literally. Documented as disclosed choice in module docstring.
